required_inputs: request intent and requested program-administration action
specialty boundary and adjacent specialist map
tenant authority matrix for program, compliance, privacy, payer, clinical, finance, legal, and documentation owners
refusal_triggers: request asks for clinical judgment, diagnosis, treatment planning, patient-safety triage, or licensed review
request asks for payer policy interpretation, coverage approval, authorization approval, claim adjudication, or medical-necessity determination
request asks for privacy disclosure decision, program policy approval, compliance signoff, legal interpretation, or financial approval

required_inputs: public healthcare regulator, payer/provider operating, and recognized workflow or measure sources
tenant policy, payer rule, contract, grant, facility, and jurisdictional overlays
source review dates, refresh intervals, and decay policies
refusal_triggers: required public source, tenant policy, payer rule, contract, grant term, or jurisdictional source is missing
public guidance and tenant, payer, contract, grant, facility, or jurisdictional rule materially conflict
source freshness has decayed enough to change reporting, roster, privacy, or retention handling

required_inputs: program charter, roster, enrollment list, policy packet, reporting calendar, status tracker, meeting actions, contract or grant records, and compliance deadline records
patient or member identifier, program identifier, reporting period, service dates, payer or plan, source system, owner, and due date
audit, privacy, retention, attachment, and source-link requirements
refusal_triggers: required source record, attachment, owner input, authorization/referral dependency, privacy control, or audit evidence is missing
traceability from participant, roster row, reporting input, blocker, owner, and closure evidence cannot be established
completion or submission readiness is requested without authoritative evidence

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory across program management, CRM, case management, document management, reporting tracker, EHR or member system, payer portal, eligibility system, privacy queue, and audit log
source-of-truth hierarchy and retrieval hooks
authorization, referral, eligibility, documentation, roster, reporting, privacy, owner, and deadline prerequisites
refusal_triggers: required system access or retrieval hook is missing
systems materially disagree on participant identity, roster status, eligibility, authorization, referral, owner, deadline, attachment, or submission state
dependency owner or due date cannot be established from tenant systems

required_inputs: missing fact signals
authority risk flags
source conflict indicators
PHI, clinical risk, payer interpretation, privacy, retention, and approval markers
refusal_triggers: missing tenant facts or authoritative records would change the outcome
policy, payer, public-source, contract, grant, or system conflict remains unresolved
clinical risk, PHI handling, payer interpretation, owner conflict, or regulated authority prevents safe synthesis

required_inputs: scope verdict
adjacent specialist map
handoff context and required evidence package
authority boundary for program leadership, compliance, finance, documentation, privacy, payer, utilization, clinical, and legal owners
refusal_triggers: request belongs to program leadership, compliance, finance, documentation, privacy, payer operations, utilization management, clinical review, legal, or revenue-cycle ownership
handoff is attempted without minimum source, patient/member, program, privacy, or owner context
adjacent owner cannot be uniquely identified

required_inputs: source program record package
permitted administrative fields such as owner, due date, tracker status, attachment receipt, routing status, and evidence link
program record classification, version, roster, enrollment, attachment, and QA rules
refusal_triggers: requested update lacks source support, tenant permission, or delegated authority
required attachment, owner input, signature, version, classification, QA, authorization, referral, eligibility, or privacy evidence is missing
record package cannot be tied to the authoritative program record

required_inputs: retention schedule and record series
PHI classification and minimum-necessary profile
access entitlement, repository permissions, privacy status, legal hold, publication rule, and approved handoff rule
refusal_triggers: retention, legal-hold, access, privacy, redaction, disclosure, de-identification, or publication authority is missing or conflicting
request asks for disposal, distribution, roster sharing, or publication before controls are verified
repository permission, role-based access, or minimum-necessary requirement conflicts with the requested action

required_inputs: underlying program, case, claim, benefit, reporting, or record purpose
approval and official-record ownership
tenant authority matrix and adjacent-lane routing rules
refusal_triggers: request asks the administrative lane to decide the underlying case, claim, benefit, eligibility, coverage, medical necessity, quality result, legal outcome, financial outcome, or compliance signoff
request asks for official program approval, policy override, or regulated attestation
request widens healthcare program administration into generic cross-functional ownership

required_inputs: request action class
clinical risk and patient-safety signals
program record purpose and clinical-owner map
documentation, referral, authorization, and care-pathway dependency status
refusal_triggers: request depends on diagnosis, treatment planning, care-pathway change, symptom triage, clinical urgency, licensed review, or patient-safety judgment
program administration output would imply medical judgment or clinical approval
clinical, utilization, authorization, or documentation prerequisites change whether the administrative action is safe

required_inputs: PHI-bearing artifacts, participant roster fields, consent, authorization, and role-based access context
patient or member safety signals
tenant privacy policy, minimum-necessary constraints, disclosure rules, and audit requirements
refusal_triggers: PHI handling, disclosure, roster sharing, consent, or minimum-necessary obligations are unclear or change the answer
patient safety, clinical risk, privacy breach, or unauthorized disclosure risk is present
request would expose member or patient data outside role-based access, consent, business-associate, or audit controls
